title: SAP Delivery Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: SAP project methodology expertise (ASAP, SAP Activate)
SAP S/4HANA migration and implementation knowledge
Broad SAP module knowledge (Finance, Logistics, Production, C/4HANA, SCM, GRC, SuccessFactors, Ariba)
End-to-end SAP solution design and delivery
Strong client-facing and stakeholder management skills
Advanced planning and project management skills
matched_skills: Stakeholder management — C-suite reporting at HSBC and multi-stakeholder coordination
Project management — programme governance and agile delivery across multiple roles
English C1 — meets English fluency requirement
Agile methodology — Hapag-Lloyd sprint coordination and JIRA/Confluence usage
missing_skills: SAP technical expertise (ASAP, SAP Activate, S/4HANA, Solution Manager)
SAP module knowledge (Finance, Logistics, SCM, GRC, SuccessFactors, Ariba)
Client proposal and statement of work preparation
core_responsibilities: Manage design and deployment of integrated end-to-end SAP solutions
Define and execute continuous delivery risk management strategy
Take accountability for technical leadership ensuring robust SAP architecture
Translate business value into SAP solution benefits
Lead delivery of SAP projects per EPAM methodologies
Manage client expectations and foster strong client relationships
Prepare detailed project estimations covering timelines, resources, and quality
recommended_emphasis: Programme governance and multi-workstream management (HSBC) as delivery management foundation
Agile sprint coordination (Hapag-Lloyd) as delivery methodology alignment
C-suite stakeholder management for client relationship experience
summary: Scoring 14.3, this is a poor match. The SAP Delivery Manager role at EPAM requires deep SAP technical expertise across multiple modules, SAP Activate/ASAP methodology knowledge, and strong German proficiency — none of which appear in Boru's CV. While Boru has transferable project management and stakeholder management skills, the SAP technical depth is a hard requirement that cannot be bridged with general PMO experience. Application is not recommended.
